div1.entryFree: Dout, to put out, to extinguish: that their hot blood may spin in English eyes, and d. them with superfluous courage, H5 IV, 2, 11 (O. Edd. doubt). I have a speech of fire, that fain would blaze, but that this folly (viz my tears) --s it, Hml. IV, 7, 192 (F1 doubts, Qq F2. Hml. IV, 7, 192 4 drowns).
